case_title: ACCESS SCAFFOLDING CO. VS LIGHT & SOUND 186 LTD.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,250.00 FILED BY ACCESS SCAFFOLDING CO. AS TO DEFENDANT LIGHT & SOUND 186 LTD. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-1999 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
